access.label: Πρόσβαση με δρόμο
access.notes: Πρόσβαση από τον δρόμο Τακτικούπολης-Μεθάνων με κατηφορικό δρόμο προς τον μικρό όρμο.

waterDepth.label: Ρηχά νερά
waterDepth.notes: Η πηγή χαρακτηρίζει το βάθος αβαθές.

sourceNotes: Source-backed Methana/Troizinia pass 2026-05-28: Exploring Greece describes Akti Agapis as a scenic small cove reached by road, with shallow water, sand/fine pebbles/small rocks, pebble-rock seabed, and not organized; Katheti also mentions the Coast of Love in the central Troizinia beach route. Confidence lifted to medium; coordinates, wind profile, and scoring were not changed.

Island confidence pass 2026-06-05: Methana/Troizinia records promoted to high for static beach facts only. Existing direct Exploring Greece, Katheti and local beach-source notes support identity/location plus recorded access, terrain, depth and service context. No coordinates, windProfile, scoring, photos, water-quality, or live calm/protected/safe claims were changed.

orientation.notes: Generated from Natural Earth geospatial exposure facingDeg. This records shoreline-facing direction only; it does not verify shelter, low-wave behavior, or live sea conditions.

access.label: Πρόσβαση μη επιβεβαιωμένη
access.notes: BeachNearby and Mapcarta/OSM support Nisaki Beach identity/location in Methana, but current evidence does not verify asphalt-road access, parking, or exact final approach for this beach card.

waterDepth.label: Μέτριο βάθος
waterDepth.notes: No direct source confirms shallow or deep water for this specific record, so depth remains neutral.

sourceNotes: Attica/Methana medium-confidence cleanup 2026-06-05 DL: neutralized unsupported asphalt-road, parking, shade, sandy-terrain and deep-water claims for Nisaki. Coordinates, windProfile, scoring, photos and live calm/protected/safe claims were not changed.

access.label: Σύντομη κατάβαση από δρόμο/μονοπάτι
access.notes: Πρόσβαση από την Καλλονή μέσω ανηφορικού δρόμου και σύντομης εύκολης κατάβασης προς την κρυμμένη ακτή.

waterDepth.label: Βαθιά νερά
waterDepth.notes: Η ακτή περιγράφεται ως βραχώδης/βοτσαλωτή και κατάλληλη για βουτιές από βράχια.

sourceNotes: Source-backed Methana/Troizinia pass 2026-05-28: Epidavros Villas describes Votsalakia as a small non-organized beach with light rounded pebbles, reached by road/track and a short easy descent, surrounded by rocks/cliffs and suitable for cliff diving; Katheti also describes it with light-colored pebbles, green-blue waters, rocks, and a beach bar. Confidence lifted to medium; coordinates, wind profile, and scoring were not changed.

access.label: Τοπικός δρόμος / χωμάτινο τελικό τμήμα
access.notes: Πρόσβαση από παράκαμψη προς Νήσιζα/Νησίδα· ο δρόμος κατεβαίνει προς τη θάλασσα και χωρίζεται προς τις μικρές ακτές.

waterDepth.label: Βαθιά νερά
waterDepth.notes: Το βάθος συνήθως ανεβαίνει πιο γρήγορα μετά την είσοδο στη θάλασσα.

sourceNotes: Source-backed Methana/Troizinia pass 2026-05-28: Exploring Greece describes the junction to Nisiza/Nisida, the road descending toward the sea, a marshy dirt-road branch, and two rocky pebble beaches on the peninsula; Katheti lists Nisiza in the Troizinia beach route.
